name: Chicken Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 can pineapple chunks, drained, reserving juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the teriyaki sauce and 1/4 cup of the reserved juice with brown sugar.
2. Cut the chicken breasts into chunks and add them to the marinade. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
3. Thread the chicken onto skewers, alternating with pineapple pieces, pepper pieces, and tomato. Zucchini or other vegetables may be added if desired.
4. Grill over medium coals for 12-15 minutes, turning often and basting with the marinade.
